seo.title: Home
seo.description: Taiwan BronyCon is a fan event combining creation, market, and exchange, featuring vendors, venue maps, schedules, and complete event information. We invite everyone who loves ponies and creative culture to participate.

home.subtitle: August 15, 2026

about.title: About Us
about.content: Taiwan BronyCon (TWBC) is an unofficial gathering for fans who love My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. We combine international convention experience with local brony culture to create a special event for Taiwanese bronies. Whether it's through exchange, creation, or games, every participant can experience the core spirit of "Friendship is Magic" and build deep connections with fellow fans.

location.title: Location
location.name: Asi Space
location.address: 10F, No. 111, Sec. 4, Sanhe Rd., Sanchong Dist., New Taipei City

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: TWBC is a fan gathering event themed around My Little Pony!
faq.q2: How many tickets are available in total?
faq.a3: Yes, but the event is mainly targeted at audiences over 16. Children under 13 might find it harder to blend in, and parents must accompany them throughout the event.
faq.q4: Will the participant's name be printed on the ID badge?
faq.a4: There is a blank space on the ID badge for participants to write their own name or nickname.
